title: UAE opens ‘safe air corridors’: Airlines allowed 48 flights per hour amid Middle East tensions
summary_full: The UAE has opened 'safe air corridors' allowing up to 48 flights hourly to stabilise regional aviation amidst geopolitical tensions and the Iran-US-Israel war. This initiative aims to restore connectivity, evacuate thousands of stranded passengers and support tourism and business sectors. Limited commercial services have resumed, with authorities planning further phases to clear the backlog.
